raw_text: Really love the vast range of product available and that too on regular basis , blinkit was first plateform and are still on top in terms of product range and swift delivery. consistent improvement visible.

Very disappointing experience. The product was delivered without any expiry date mentioned on the packaging, and the package itself looked very old. Even after raising the concern, there was no proper response from the seller/support team. This creates serious doubts about the product quality and safety. Poor customer service and lack of accountability.

please do not buy from BLINKIT this is my humble request, there is support is provided by them and UBON is also a worst service, This product is not working properly. and we are not able to return or replacement as well. NOTE: Please do not buy any product from BLINKIT app.

I have been using the Blinkit app for several months now, and it is absolutely wonderful. The delivery is incredibly fast—sometimes everything arrives in just 5 to 10 minutes! Whether it's food items or daily essentials, everything is packed properly and delivered safely. A well-deserved 5 stars from my side. I absolutely love this app!

Blinkit is so helpful when I move to HYD, it was a life saving app for me, as I was new here, this app helped me a lot for buy things just like that.. I hope this app starts operating in my native place, Assam (Tezpur) also. 'Get everything in just 15-25 min.'☺️ I really want to appreciate their outer packaging, it's always nice to see.. Every time I order something, I find new different activities, games, etc., it makes me smile.. whoever is handling those things, doing awesome work.. keep up👍

Very poor experience with Blinkit. I have ₹472 in my Blinkit Money wallet, but I am unable to use it while placing an order. The app shows “payment method not available” and no other payment options are visible. On top of that, customer support is completely useless. The chatbot keeps looping and does not provide any option to connect to a human agent or even type the issue. My money is stuck in the wallet and I cannot use it at all. This is unacceptable. Please fix this issue immediately or

This app is very helpful specially in emergency time. very greatful when having such kind of app which instantly deliveres the needs but their is some problems I'm facing that's why I'm writing this review.., the app is so much lagging during opening time and it takes 5-10 mins in opening only and it always shows "can't find your location even when my WiFi and location is on" . please sort this problem as soon as you guys can. Other than this problem the app awesome 👍

I like the window shopping from.blinkit UI is best in the category with lightning fast traversing from one product category to other and number of payment options make it easy to choose the payment method .

Hello team it's aditya here I have been one of your frequent customers since few months and I would like to share my experience it has been very good being with you and ordering stuff but I am currently facing issues and my friend have been facing the same issues so it's regarding the game you launched hit your best shot during ipl matches long story short we aren't receiving mystery gift upon. ordering please solve this issue because i really got sad when I didn't recieved a mystery gift

I had a very frustrating experience where the rider delivered my order to the wrong person just because of similar names in the locality, without even calling to verify. The 'Call Delivery Partner' feature is also very glitchy. However, I must appreciate the support team—they were very helpful and quickly reordered the missing items for me. While the support is good, the delivery security needs a major overhaul. Deleting the app until they fix these basic verification issues

Very poor service by blinkit. Delivered products are so pathetic. i have ordered 3 kombucha and 1 cold drink which is very hot, seems like a hot tea. So pathetic system for delivery that company forget to choose the correct product just to deliver in 10-15 mins, you should be ashamed for this kind of product service.

The app is super clean and incredibly easy to use. The search function is highly accurate, and checking out takes less than thirty seconds. Real-time rider tracking is spot on and keeps me updated every single minute.

Very worst for the old customers for new customers handling fee is only 2rs but for old customers it was 12 and no minimum order quantity. Also chat support is available for new customers but for old customers only email support. Very worst service

Please check all the items when you receive your orders. these people just mentione in the app stating it's delivered but they don't deliver all the items and they don't even refund your money. Never place prepaid orders, always go with COD.

I have been ordering from Blinkit from a long time, but every order I have placed this year have resulted in delays or cancellations. When I try to get update on the order the same automated messages are relayed back until there is extreme delays in order. Multiple friends had told me about similar incidents and now after experiencing too many times I am uninstalling the app immediately. Both Zomato and Blinkit need proper management!

Don't use blinkit. I was a regular user of blinkit. I ordered from blinkit almost daily. My last order was a Wifi ups. The product didn't work. Blinkit customer support just asked for more and more proofs(photos and videos) of the product. i shared them all. At last, they said we couldn't find the router in your video. Although the router was clearly visible. Customer service is pathetic. I wish you luck if you order from blinkit. Blinkit, you have earned a 1000 rs but lost a user for ever.

I cannot describe you how well this app is everything will be delivered at your door step and the delivery partner are also amazing they are kind , they are humble.. and if you don't like some product so you can also take your money back.

Had a really great experience with Blinkit! 🚀 My order arrived quickly, everything was packed properly, and the delivery partner was polite and professional. The whole process was smooth and hassle-free. Definitely impressed with the service and convenience. Keep up the good work! 😊

i have been scammed from this particular dark store, the order was never delivered to me and they marked delivered, after emailing the team they said they investigated thoroughly and it was delivered to the owner but no this did not happen and now i am facing a loss in monetary and trust from this issue. And no its not the first time it is the third time in a month, a scam which happens at night. I will go to consumer court for my rights its not about money now it is about user violation! ⚠️

"Blinkit delivery partners are really helpful. They treat customers with care, almost like a father or brother helping at home. The delivery was quick, polite, and hassle-free. The app is easy to use, products are available when needed, and the overall service is excellent. Thank you, Blinkit, for making everyday shopping so convenient. Highly recommended!"
